capex_mentions.quote: pro-rata share of the remaining estimated costs for this second phase of the development was $216.8 million as of December 31, 2025
capex_mentions.context: Data center joint venture with Digital Realty Trust, expanding capacity for existing client

limitations: The $216.8 million capex figure relates to the data center joint venture (with Digital Realty Trust) rather than direct AI infrastructure spend; scored intensity as 3 rather than 4 because the data center investment is not explicitly labeled as AI-driven capex and the $50 billion figure is transaction volume evaluated, not investment spend
The data center joint venture carrying amount and remaining costs are the closest quantified infrastructure figures but are not explicitly tied to AI workloads in the excerpts
Risk disclosure scored 3 (named risk categories) rather than 4 because mechanisms described are generic across AI risk types without company-specific revenue/operations impact scenarios
